on_warning.Base_pos: Please put your hands from each other to horizontal position

both_hands.tpose_arms_above: Move your hands down to a horizontal position.
both_hands.tpose_arms_below: Move your clasped hands up to a horizontal position.
both_hands.tpose_arms_wrong: Try to place your arms horizontally.
both_hands.Foreground_hands_pos: Extend your arms horizontally to the sides, not forward.

on_warning.default: Try to put your hands to horizontal position better.

on_phase.phase1: Put your hands horizontally from each other up.
